'''kavazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zelkova|zelkova]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zelkova|zelkova]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kavazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kævæzhæth|kævæzhæth]] || [[word:kævæzhæj|kævæzhæj]] || [[word:kævæzhæsh|kævæzhæsh]] || [[word:kævæzhæ|kævæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kavavazhath|kavavazhath]] || [[word:kavavazhaj|kavavazhaj]] || [[word:kavavazhash|kavavazhash]] || [[word:kavavazha|kavavazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kavazhath|kavazhath]] || [[word:kavazhaj|kavazhaj]] || [[word:kavazhash|kavazhash]] || [[word:kavazha|kavazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kavafzhath|kavafzhath]] || [[word:kavafzhaj|kavafzhaj]] || [[word:kavafzhash|kavafzhash]] || [[word:kavafzhaf|kavafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kavazhatha|kavazhatha]] || [[word:kavazhaja|kavazhaja]] || [[word:kavazhasha|kavazhasha]] || [[word:kavazhaka|kavazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kavazhath|kavazhath]] || [[word:kavazhaj|kavazhaj]] || [[word:kavazhash|kavazhash]] || [[word:kavazha|kavazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kavazhathal|kavazhathal]] || [[word:kavazhajal|kavazhajal]] || [[word:kavazhashal|kavazhashal]] || [[word:kavazhakal|kavazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kavazhathatha|kavazhathatha]] || [[word:kavazhajaja|kavazhajaja]] || [[word:kavazhashasha|kavazhashasha]] || [[word:kavazhaka|kavazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kavazhathan|kavazhathan]] || [[word:kavazhajan|kavazhajan]] || [[word:kavazhashan|kavazhashan]] || [[word:kavazhakan|kavazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kavazhathaoro|kavazhathaoro]] || [[word:kavazhajaoro|kavazhajaoro]] || [[word:kavazhashaoro|kavazhashaoro]] || [[word:kavazhakaoro|kavazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
